settings.hero_subtitle: Earn points for exclusive rewards every time you shop.
settings.steps_subtitle: Earn points and get rewarded in a few easy steps.
settings.step1_description: To get started, create an account. You can sign up on our website or mobile app to access the full range of reward benefits.
settings.step2_description: Make purchases and earn reward points automatically. You will earn points on all qualifying purchases.
settings.step3_description: As you earn points, you can redeem them for rewards—like discounts, free products, and exclusive offers.
settings.custom_section_title: Earn points every time you shop
settings.custom_section_subtitle: Collect more points by completing activities like entering your birthday, following us on social media, or referring a friend.
settings.footer_custom_text: Terms and conditions apply. See program details for more information.
settings.footer_signup_subtext: Use your points to redeem samples and more.
